category_sources: Official Academy CTL page describes Color Transformation Language as a scripting language and interpreter for color management systems.
source_facts.description says CTL is a programming language for digital color management.
display_name_sources: Official Academy page uses the name Color Transformation Language and abbreviation CTL.
source_facts.homepage official repository is https://github.com/ampas/CTL, whose project name is CTL.
docs_sources: Official Academy CTL project page is the best dedicated documentation/overview surface found.
Official GitHub README is the project repository documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/ampas/CTL; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official Academy CTL page describes a scripting language and interpreter for color management systems.
source_facts.description identifies digital color management language functionality.
